Class clsCast

java.lang.Object
org.example.clsCast
public class clsCast extends Object
Represents a cast member in a movie, linking an actor to a specific role in a film. This class manages the relationship between actors and movies, storing information about the roles they play.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    clsCast()
    Default constructor that creates an empty Cast object.
    clsCast(int castID, int actorID, int movieID, String role)
    Parameterized constructor that creates a Cast object with specified values.

  • Constructor Details

    • clsCast

      public clsCast()
      Default constructor that creates an empty Cast object. All integer fields are initialized to 0 and role is initialized to null.

    • clsCast

      public clsCast(int castID, int actorID, int movieID, String role)
      Parameterized constructor that creates a Cast object with specified values.
      Parameters:
      castID - the unique identifier for this cast entry
      actorID - the identifier of the actor
      movieID - the identifier of the movie
      role - the role or character name played by the actor

  • Method Details

    • getCastID

      public int getCastID()
      Gets the cast ID.
      Returns:
      the unique identifier for this cast entry

    • setCastID

      public void setCastID(int castID)
      Sets the cast ID.
      Parameters:
      castID - the unique identifier to set for this cast entry

    • getActorID

      public int getActorID()
      Gets the actor ID.
      Returns:
      the identifier of the actor

    • setActorID

      public void setActorID(int actorID)
      Sets the actor ID.
      Parameters:
      actorID - the identifier of the actor to set

    • getMovieID

      public int getMovieID()
      Gets the movie ID.
      Returns:
      the identifier of the movie

    • setMovieID

      public void setMovieID(int movieID)
      Sets the movie ID.
      Parameters:
      movieID - the identifier of the movie to set

    • getRole

      public String getRole()
      Gets the role name.
      Returns:
      the role or character name played by the actor

    • setRole

      public void setRole(String role)
      Sets the role name.
      Parameters:
      role - the role or character name to set

    • getCastDetails

      public String getCastDetails()
      Retrieves a formatted string containing all cast details.
      Returns:
      a string representation of all cast information including cast ID, actor ID, movie ID, and role

    • listMovieActors

      public String listMovieActors()
      Generates a human-readable description of the actor's appearance in the movie.
      Returns:
      a formatted string describing which actor appears in which movie and what role they play
